```{python}

import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

sns.scatterplot(x=[1,2,3], y=[1,2,3])

sns.set_theme(style='darkgrid')

# there are several palettes colors to visualization

sns.color_palette()
sns.color_palette('Set2')
sns.color_palette('Set3')
sns.color_palette('hls', 8)
sns.color_palette('hls', 4)
sns.color_palette('hls', 10)
sns.color_palette('Paired')
sns.color_palette('rocket')
sns.color_palette('rocket', as_cmap=True)
sns.color_palette('deep')

tips_data = pd.read_csv(r'C:\Users\ATL8CA\Desktop\Datasets\datasets\tips.csv')

tips_data

sns.scatterplot(tips_data, x='total_bill', y='tip', size='size', style='smoker')

sns.relplot(data=tips_data, x='total_bill', y='tip', 
size='size', style='smoker', col='day', col_wrap=2, # kind='scatter') # with weekends col

sns.relplot(data=tips_data, x='total_bill', y='tip', 
size='size', style='smoker', col='sex', col_wrap=2, kind='scatter') # with gender col

plt.legend()


```

```{python}

dow_data = pd.read_csv(r'')

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```

```{python}

```
